text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose a participating character controlled by each player - honor each of those characters.
name: Kiku Matsuri

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed - search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for an attachment and put it into play attached to a character you control. Shuffle.
name: Illustrious Forge

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose a character with the highest printed cost among characters in play - bow that character.
name: Midnight Revels

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed - resolve the contested ring's effects as if you were the attacking player.
name: Temple of the Dragons

text: Action: During a conflict at this province - your opponent loses 1 fate.
flavorText: "New daimyō, same tax."
name: Vassal Fields

text: While you are less honorable than an opponent, this character gets +1[conflict-military]. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. Put 1 fate on the duel's winner.
name: Daring Challenger

text: Action: Dishonor this character - reduce the cost of the next attachment or character you play this phase by 1.
flavorText: "Have you considered a blade forged by Kakita Ashidaka to add to your family's heritage?"
name: Yasuki Procurer

flavorText: He names each weapon he constructs after a Crab warrior who died bravely in battle, that their spirit might know revenge. And yet as fast as his hands work, the list of names grows faster still.
name: Siege Captain

text: While you are less honorable than an opponent, this character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution in [conflict-military] conflicts and cannot lose duels. (This character is not the duel's loser, but the opponent's character is still the duel's winner.)
name: Hida Yakamo

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which you are defending, discard a card from your hand and choose a ready attacking character. That character's controller selects one - bow that character, or remove 1 fate from it.
name: Heavy Ballista

text: Composure - This character cannot be chosen as the target of an opponent's triggered ability. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.)
name: Ichigenkin Soloist

text: After this character wins a duel, honor it. After this character loses a duel, dishonor it. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner draws 2 cards.
name: Courtly Challenger

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating on your side alone - your opponent chooses and discards 1 card from his or her hand. If this character is honored, that card is chosen at random instead. Errata from RRG v9
name: Paragon of Grace

text: Interrupt: When this character would lose a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. If this character wins, instead of resolving the conflict as normal, both players count 0 total skill in the conflict. (Return the contested ring to the unclaimed ring pool. The conflict has no winner.)
name: Kakita Toshimoko

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel – resolve the duel. Until the end of the conflict, the duel's loser cannot trigger its abilities. If the duel's winner is a Duelist, bow the duel's loser as well.
name: Kakita Dōjō

text: Composure - This character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political]. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.)
flavorText: "What is there to learn from a book that cannot be taught by a flower?"
name: Kitsuki Counselor

text: Courtesy. (When this character leaves play, gain 1 fate.) Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. Choose an attachment attached to the duel's loser and discard it.
name: Prudent Challenger

text: Action: Choose an unclaimed ring - move 1 fate from that ring to another unclaimed ring. Then, gain 1 honor.
flavorText: "Enlightenment is the unbent blade of grass amidst a raging storm."
name: Tranquil Philosopher

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel against up to two characters your opponent controls - resolve the duel. For each character that loses the duel, its controller must either dishonor or bow it.
flavorText: Had there been a time when Hitomi smiled? Perhaps before her brother had died, but rarely since then...
name: Mirumoto Hitomi

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel – resolve the duel. Move 1 fate from the duel's loser to its owner's fate pool. If the duel's winner is a Duelist, discard that fate instead.
name: Mirumoto Dōjō

text: Pride. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. The duel's winner does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.
name: Honorable Challenger

text: While you are more honorable than an opponent, this character gets +2[conflict-political].
flavorText: "I could go on for hours. And I will."
name: Ikoma Orator

text: Composure - This character cannot lose fate or be discarded. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.)
flavorText: "Each scar teaches her more than would a library."
name: Student of War

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, if you are more honorable than your opponent – reduce the cost of the next card you play this conflict by 2.
flavorText: "We take what we want by strength of honor, or not at all."
name: Matsu Tsuko

text: Each honored character you control gets +1[conflict-military].
flavorText: "Lion generals sure do love a surprise... as long as it's planned." - Ikoma Ikehata
name: Tactician's Camp

text: This character cannot be declared as an attacker except during [element-fire] conflicts.
flavorText: "I had barely bowed my head before the trees began to burn. What has drawn so many fire kami to this place?"
name: Fire Tensai Acolyte

text: Composure - This character gets +2[conflict-political]. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.) Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel - resolve the duel. The duel's winner is immune to events until the end of the the conflict.
name: Sincere Challenger

text: Action: During a conflict, if you are more honorable than your opponent, choose a participating character your opponent controls - move this character home. Then, move that character home.
name: Sage of Gisei Toshi

text: Forced Reaction: After the [element-void] ring is claimed, choose a character with no fate - remove that character from the game. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: Had she killed him? But there was not blood on the ninjato's blade. Nor was there a body... He was gone-- whoever he was.
name: Isawa Ujina

text: Action: Return 1 or more rings from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool - you gain 1 honor for each ring returned this way.
flavorText: The lights shine through the Yomi in the hopes of finding those they once knew.
name: Ancestral Shrine

text: After this character wins a conflict, gain 1 honor. After this character loses a conflict, lose 1 honor. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel - resolve the duel. Treat the printed text box of the duel's loser as if it were blank (except for Traits) until the end of the conflict.
name: Loyal Challenger

text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict - look at the top 2 cards of your opponent's conflict deck. You may discard 1 of those cards
flavorText: Those who know Ryokō Owari Toshi know not to stay out after nightfall.
name: Midnight Prowler

flavorText: "Will that be all?"
name: Attendant to the Emperor

text: Composure - This character must be chosen as a target of an opponent's event, if able. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.) Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - switch honor dials with your opponent until your next honor bid.
name: Social Puppeteer

text: Action: Lose 1 honor – search your conflict deck for a Poison card, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.
flavorText: "Through blackmail, lies and poison, he schemes to see his sister fall."
name: Shosuro Hametsu

text: Reaction: After a character is moved to the conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character - honor that character.
name: Outskirts Sentry

text: Composure - This character gets +2[conflict-military]. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.) Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner moves a character from his or her home area to the conflict.
name: Honest Challenger

text: Reaction: After you reveal your honor dial - change the bid on your dial to a value 1 higher or lower than its current value (to a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 5).
flavorText: His eyes betrayed him, as the eyes of the sultan had in Safa Silib.
name: Ide Negotiator

text: Reaction: After an opponent gains 1 or more honor through a card effect - ready this character.
name: Shiotome Heroine

text: While this character is dishonored, do not subtract its glory from its skills. Reaction: After an opponent breaks one of your provinces, choose and discard a card from your hand - ready and honor this character.
name: Utaku Kamoko

text: Composure - This character gets +2 glory. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.) Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. Honor the duel's winner.
name: Aspiring Challenger

text: Interrupt: When the effects of a character ability that targets a unique character you control would initiate, sacrifice this character - cancel those effects. The player who initiated that ability discards 1 random card from his or her hand.
name: Seppun Hidden Guard

text: Seeker role only. While this character is attacking, each character with printed cost 4 or higher does not count its skill towards the resolution of this conflict.
name: Humble Magistrate

text: Keeper role only. While this character is defending, players cannot gain or lose honor.
flavorText: Her gaze silences dissent.
name: Righteous Magistrate

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have the Imperial Favor - each player cannot play cards from his or her hand until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "I fear you are searching for the perfect answer. Sometimes there is none, and you must still make a decision." – Agasha Sumiko
name: Akodo Toturi

text: No attachments. If an opponent has the Imperial Favor, discard this character. Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character - bow that character. Interrupt: When an opponent triggers an ability that chooses 1 or more targets - you choose those targets instead.
name: Hantei XXXVIII

text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: Look at the top 4 cards of your dynasty deck. You may choose an Imperial character from among them and switch it with this card (faceup). Put the cards back on top in any order.
name: Miya Library

text: Reaction: After a character you control wins a duel - draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.)
name: Proving Ground

text: Air role only. Composure - This character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts in which it is defending. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.)
name: Guardian of Virtue

text: Attach to a Bushi character. Restricted. Reaction: After attached character wins a [conflict-military] conflict, remove 1 fate from attached character. Your opponent chooses a participating character he or she controls - discard that character.
name: Honed Nodachi

text: Action: Give an opponent 1 honor and choose an ability on a character you control - you may trigger that ability an additional time this round (or specified period).
flavorText: "I never thought I would be outmaneuvered in a deal twice in one day... or that I would find myself grateful on both occasions." – Yasuki Taka
name: Smuggling Deal

text: Action: During a conflict, sacrifice a (friendly) defending character and choose an attacking character - set the attacking character's [conflict-military] skill to 0 until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "Give her a proper funeral, with all honors. She honored her family, and served her daimyō well." – Hida Kisada
name: In Defense of Rokugan

text: Attach to a Duelist character. Reaction: After honor dials are revealed during a duel in which attached character is participating - increase or decrease the value of your bid by 1 (to a minimum of 0).
name: Iaijutsu Master

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character that has lost a duel during this conflict - bow that character. You may spend 1 fate to dishonor that character.
flavorText: An honorable lineage, undone by a single stroke.
name: Storied Defeat

text: Action: During a conflict in which you control a participating honored Courtier character, choose an attacking character - move that character home.
name: Try Again Tomorrow

text: Earth role only. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice – resolve the duel. Until the end of the conflict, the duel’s loser gains: "Increase the cost to play each card in your hand by 1."
name: Civil Discourse

text: Air role only. If attached character is participating in a conflict with 1 or more other characters you control, discard this attachment. Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict – gain 1 honor.
name: Solitary Strength

text:
Restricted.  Attached character may not have other restricted attachments.
While attached character is dueling, your opponent cannot bid 1 or 5.
flavorText: "When your opponent sees but a single blade, you have achieved victory." - Mirumoto's Niten
name: Mirumoto Daishō

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character that has won a duel during this conflict - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +2[conflict-military], +2[conflict-political], and cannot be chosen as the target of opponent's events.
name: Magnificent Triumph

text: Play only if your honor bid is equal to an opponent's. Action: Each player shuffles his or her hand and conflict discard pile into his or her conflict deck and draws 4 cards. Remove this card from the game.
name: Karmic Balance

text: Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel, using each character's base [conflict-military] instead of their total [conflict-military] skill for this duel. Bow the duel's loser."
name: True Strike Kenjutsu

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose an attachment on a participating character - discard that attachment. Then, your opponent may resolve this ability.
flavorText: "On the battlefield, all actions are honorable." – Akodo's Leadership
name: Hand to Hand

text: Void Role only. Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] conflict, your opponent chooses a participating character he or she controls. Select one - remove all fate from that character, or move any amount of fate from your opponent's fate pool onto that character.
name: The Fires of Justice

text: Reaction: After you break a province during a [conflict-military] conflict – honor each character you control.
flavorText: "If we should be victorious, it is because the heavens will it."
name: Glorious Victory

text: Fire role only. Attached character cannot receive dishonored status tokens. Forced Reaction: After attached character loses a conflict - discard this attachment. Errata from RRG v11
name: Unmatched Expertise

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict by 5 or more skill, choose a character you control – honor that character.
flavorText: "Even the Fortunes must recognize greatness."
name: Gift of Amaterasu

text: Action: Perform a glory count. The player who loses the glory count returns all rings in his or her claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool.
flavorText: "There is no place for you, not even the Void."
name: Severed From the Stream

text: Action: During a conflict, if you are more honorable than your opponent - until the end of the conflict, each participating character you control adds its glory to each of its skills. (This applies in addition to any modifiers to the skills of those characters due to being honored or dishonored.)
name: Subdue the Spirits

text: Attach to a Shinobi character. Attached character gains covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.)
name: Infiltrator's Tools

text: Reaction: After a character your opponent controls triggers an ability - bow that character.
flavorText: "The deadliest poison produces the most beautiful shade."
name: Kirei-ko

text: Void role only. Action: During a conflict, if the bid on your honor dial is higher than your opponent’s, choose a participating character – discard that character’s status token and set its skills to their printed values until the end of the conflict. Its controller gains 2 honor.
name: Unmask

text: Play only if you have 6 or fewer honor. Action: During a conflict, choose a non-unique character in your opponent's dynasty discard pile and a participating character you control - until the end of the conflict, your character becomes a copy of the character in your opponent's discard pile.
name: Miyako's Undertaking

text: Reaction: After you play this character into a conflict - the attacked province cannot trigger its abilities this conflict.
flavorText: "Entering an unfamiliar forest was your first mistake."
name: Shinjo Ambusher

text: Action: While attached character is attacking, lose 1 honor - reduce the attacked province's province strength by 1 until the end of the conflict (to a minimum of 0). (Unlimited.)
flavorText: A tempest of sand and hate striving for liberation.
name: Jewel of the Khamasīn

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel, giving each dueling character +1[conflict-military] for each other participating character controlled by the same player until the end of the duel. Move the duel's loser home.
flavorText: "Face me, Shono! Fight me now!" - Matsu Mitsuko
name: Challenge on the Fields

text: Air role only. Interrupt: When you would resolve a ring effect, choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower in your provinces – instead of resolving the ring effect, put that character into play.
name: Leniency

text: Action: Spend 1 fate and select one - this character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] until the end of the phase, or this character gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political] until the end of the phase. Any player may trigger this ability. (Unlimited.) Card design by 2017 World Champion Samuel Benies.
name: Kujira's Hireling

text: Seeker role only. While attached character is attacking, the contested ring gains the element of your role. (If attached character wins the conflict as an attacker, you may choose which of its ring effects to resolve.)
name: Unveiled Destiny

text: Keeper role only. Interrupt: When the effects of an opponent's event would initiate during a conflict, initate a [conflict-military] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. If your character is the duel's winner, cancel those effects.
name: Defend Your Honor

text: Interrupt: When a duel that targets a character you control would resolve - cancel the duel. Errata from RRG v2.0
flavorText: "Another time, perhaps."
name: Stay Your Hand

text: Play only if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's. Action: Choose a card in your conflict discard pile - play that card as if it were in your hand. If that card is an event, put it on the bottom of your conflict deck.
name: Warm Welcome

text: Action: Each player with 19 or more honor loses 4 honor. Each player with 6 or fewer honor gains 4 honor. Draw 1 card.
flavorText: While some wish for glory, most simply desire comfort.
name: Prayers to Ebisu
